decisionRule: If the tool's output or action would be subject to access control, audit requirements, or regulatory obligations in a well-governed deployment, classify as sensitive.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Persistent key-value store with vector embedding — survives across sessions and is searchable by meaning, not just by file path. Use when native Write is wrong because the data is not a file (e.g. a learned pattern, a decision, a budget config) AND you need to recall it later by semantic query, not by path. Defaults to namespace=

tools.name: ryvo_protocol_config
tools.description: Fetch Ryvo Protocol global config and token registry.

tools.name: drift_session_create
tools.description: Create a new Cortex session for tracking token usage and loaded memories.

tools.name: board_read
tools.description: Browse the Lightning Faucet message board. Returns recent posts from AI agents with scores, topics, and reply counts. Free — no payment required. Use this to discover what other agents are discussing.

tools.name: send_invite_link
tools.description: Send a password reset invite link email to an existing user in OneLogin. User clicks link to set password and access OneLogin portal. Email parameter is case-sensitive. Use personal_email to send to different address than user\

tools.name: jingswap_cancel_sbtc
tools.description: Cancel your sBTC deposit from the current Jingswap auction cycle and get a full refund.

tools.name: get_deposit_invoice
tools.description: Create a Lightning invoice to fund your operator account. Pay this invoice to add sats to your balance.

tools.name: memory_store
tools.description: Persistent key-value store with vector embedding — survives across sessions and is searchable by meaning, not just by file path. Use when native Write is wrong because the data is not a file (e.g. a learned pattern, a decision, a budget config) AND you need to recall it later by semantic query, not by path. Defaults to namespace=

tools.name: security_quick_scan
tools.description: Quick vulnerability scan without taint analysis, secret detection, or dependency audit.

tools.name: baserow_auth_login
tools.description: Login with username and password to get JWT token

tools.name: validate_iban
tools.description: Verify a European IBAN AND enrich it with bank, compliance and routing data. Use whenever the user mentions an IBAN, asks who the bank is, or asks if a SEPA payment will go through. Returns: valid, country, BIC, bank name, EMI/vIBAN flag, SEPA + VoP, risk_score, Swiss bc_nummer for CH/LI. Cost: $0.005.

tools.name: get_hiro_api_key
tools.description: Check whether a Hiro API key is configured. Shows the key source (stored file or environment variable) and a masked preview.

tools.name: create_api_key
tools.description: Create a new API key with specified scopes.

tools.name: get_smart_hook_env_vars
tools.description: Get environment variable names configured for a Smart Hook. Returns only variable names, not values (values are redacted for security). Environment variables store sensitive configuration like API keys, tokens, or service URLs that hook code can access via process.env. Use to audit what config variables a hook uses. Returns env var names array and x-request-id.

tools.name: generate_social_kit
tools.description: Generate a social media strategy + content kit (posts, captions, calendar, analytics framework). Requires Founder sub or SOCIAL_MEDIA_KIT purchase.

tools.name: Security Agent
tools.description: Security-focused agent for code auditing, vulnerability scanning, and threat detection. 15 built-in security controls including path traversal, injection, and credential protection.

tools.name: create_app
tools.description: Create a new app based on a OneLogin connector. Minimum required: connector_id and name. For OIDC apps, use configuration to set login_url, redirect_uri, etc. For complete configuration options, use get_app on an existing app with the same connector. For OpenId Connect apps: response includes client_id and client_secret. Returns created app data and x-request-id.

tools.name: lightning_pay_invoice
tools.description: Pay a BOLT-11 Lightning invoice from the embedded Lightning wallet.

tools.name: renew_access_token
tools.description: Renew the DhanHQ access token for another 24 hours.

tools.name: generate_invite_link
tools.description: Generate a password reset invite link for an existing user in OneLogin. Returns the link URL but does NOT send any email - use send_invite_link to email it. Provide link to user to enable them to set password and access OneLogin portal. Email parameter is case-sensitive. Returns invite link and x-request-id (API v1 - Rate Limited).

tools.name: 1ly_update_link
tools.description: Update an API link by id (requires ONELY_API_KEY).

tools.name: moltguard_credential_issue
tools.description: Issue a W3C Verifiable Credential (AgentTrustCredential) for a wallet.

tools.name: 1ly_list_keys
tools.description: List API keys for the authenticated agent store (requires ONELY_API_KEY).

tools.name: list_global_environment_variables
tools.description: List all global (account-level) environment variables. These variables are available across all projects in the account. Returns variable names, masked values, and settings.

tools.name: keysend
tools.description: Send a payment directly to a node without an invoice (keysend/spontaneous payment). REQUIRES AGENT KEY.

tools.name: claim_api_key
tools.description: Claim an API key using a claim token from the container.

tools.name: sieve_usage
tools.description: Check your Sieve API usage for the current billing period.

tools.name: healthcare/literature-search
tools.description: Search medical literature with semantic understanding. Supports PubMed, Cochrane, and UpToDate sources with evidence level filtering.
tools.human_notes: FP: "medical" matched published literature search, not patient data

tools.name: ssh_connect
tools.description: Connect to an SSH server using password or SSH key authentication. Supports IPv4 and IPv6.

tools.name: salary_ai_risk
tools.description: AI automation risk scores by ISCO occupation or NACE sector — exposure, complementarity, risk level
tools.human_notes: FP: "salary" matched aggregate occupation risk scores, not individual salary data

tools.name: credentials_list
tools.description: List all stored credentials. Shows service names, key names, and last-updated timestamps. Does NOT reveal credential values.

tools.name: hive_settle
tools.description: Settle a payment between two agents on one of 4 rails: Base USDC (Coinbase L2),

tools.name: find_opendart_compensation
tools.description: OpenDART에서 기업의 이사 및 감사 보수 정보를 수집합니다.

tools.name: checkout
tools.description: Complete the flight booking. IMPORTANT: Set confirm=true only when you have explicit user confirmation to purchase. Without confirm=true, returns a preview of the booking details.

tools.name: gw_reset_password
tools.description: Resetta la password di un utente. Se non specificata, ne genera una temporanea sicura.

tools.name: backup_database
tools.description: Back up the Kiln database with optional credential redaction.

tools.name: ssh_resolve_host
tools.description: Resolves a host alias from ~/.ssh/config to connection parameters

tools.name: get_connection_string
tools.description: Get the Redis/Valkey connection string (redis:// URL) for a running instance.

tools.name: decode_invoice
tools.description: Decode a BOLT11 invoice without paying it. Returns amount, description, expiry, and destination.

tools.name: create_api_authorization
tools.description: Create a new API authorization (OAuth 2.0 resource server) to protect your APIs with OneLogin. Required: name. Optional: description, connector_id (omit to use the account default API authorization connector), and a nested configuration object ({audiences, resource_identifier, access_token_expiration_minutes, refresh_token_expiration_minutes}). For convenience this tool also accepts top-level audience/audiences/resource_identifier/*_expiration_minutes and hoists them into configuration. Scopes can be provided as an array of {value, description} objects (value required); claims as an array of {name, user_attribute_mappings, user_attribute_macros?, attributes_transformations?} objects (name and user_attribute_mappings required) — both created alongside the authorization. Returns created authorization with ID and x-request-id.

tools.name: verify_session_factor
tools.description: Complete MFA verification during session login to obtain session token. Use in conjunction with create_session_login_token after MFA challenge. Provide device_id (from MFA challenge) and state_token. For OTP factors (SMS, Email, Authenticator): include otp_token. For OneLogin Protect: first call triggers push, subsequent calls poll with do_not_notify=true. Returns session_token on success or pending status for push factors. Returns session data and x-request-id.

tools.name: soul_profile
tools.description: Agent identity profile — trust score, behavioral DNA, character traits, SX# passport

tools.name: get_org_plan
tools.description: Get the current org plan, seat usage, and billing info for an organization.

tools.name: self_check
tools.description: Runs automated self-diagnosis on the Nervous System. Checks for: rate-limiting own operations, secrets in source code, info leakage in tool output, hardcoded paths, missing smoke tests, and version desync. Run before every publish and as part of security audits.

tools.name: ryvo_gateway_call
tools.description: Call an Ryvo Gateway route. Use without payment/SIWX headers to issue a challenge, then retry with PAYMENT-SIGNATURE, X-PAYMENT, or SIGN-IN-WITH-X. Devnet RPC/DAS/Wallet routes settle in devnet USDC; mainnet routes settle in mainnet USDC; Tokens API SIWX routes are free.

tools.name: create_session_login_token
tools.description: Authenticate a user and create a session token for custom login flows. Provide username/email and password. If MFA not required: returns session_token immediately for SSO access. If MFA required: returns state_token, devices (available MFA factors with device_id), and user info - must then call verify_session_factor. Use subdomain parameter to specify OneLogin account. Returns authentication result with session data or MFA challenge and x-request-id.

tools.name: get_restock_suggestions
tools.description: Find materials running low and generate purchase links.

tools.name: retrieve_credential
tools.description: Decrypt and return a stored credential.

tools.name: create_account
tools.description: Create a new child account under your reseller account. Requires reseller privileges. The account object should contain name and optionally address1, address2, city, state, zip, country, phone, homepage, notes. Optionally specify plan (subscription plan name), subscription_state, enforce_user_limit, email_activation (true to send activation email to account owner), and api_credential (with name and permission: authentication_only, read_users, manage_users, read_all, or manage_all) to auto-create API credentials. Returns created account data with new ID and x-request-id for log tracing.

tools.name: key
tools.description: Save an API key to .env for persistent use. e.g. key('EXA_API_KEY', 'sk-...')

tools.name: list_supported_stocks
tools.description: List tokenized US stocks tradable via Dinari. Without DINARI_API_KEY, returns a representative subset (10 high-confidence tickers) so the tool is useful for inspection. With credentials, fetches live from Dinari.
tools.human_notes: FP: "api_key" appeared in description context; tool just lists tickers

tools.name: peptide_properties
tools.description: Compute peptide molecular properties from SMILES: molecular weight, formula, logP, TPSA, H-bond donors/acceptors, rotatable bonds, ring count, fraction Csp3, heavy atoms, formal charge, and Lipinski Rule-of-5 evaluation.
tools.human_notes: FP: "charge" matched molecular formal charge (chemistry), not financial

tools.name: credentials_set
tools.description: Store or update a credential. Encrypts the value with AES-256-GCM and saves to ~/.aibtc/credentials.enc. If the service/key pair already exists, it is updated.

tools.name: protect_pdf
tools.description: Add password protection to a PDF. Anyone opening the output will need the supplied password.

tools.name: set_api_key
tools.description: Activate an IndieStack API key for this session.

tools.name: ryvo_gateway_call_with_headers
tools.description: Call a Gateway route with caller-supplied auth/payment headers. MCP does not sign, pay, or execute wallet commands. Devnet routes expect devnet-USDC payment headers; mainnet routes expect mainnet-USDC headers; Tokens API SIWX routes are free.

tools.name: deep_research_report
tools.description: Get final report from completed deep research session

tools.name: tapd_get_test_plan_count
tools.description: Get the count of test plans

tools.name: get_market_info
tools.description: Get market info for all available instruments

tools.name: get_project_schemes
tools.description: Get the available build schemes for the specified Xcode project or workspace.

tools.name: paean_list_tasks
tools.description: List tasks with optional filtering

tools.name: ActivateObjects
tools.description: Activate one or multiple ABAP repository objects. Use after Create/Update when objects remain inactive, or for group activation of related objects (e.g., domains + data elements + tables together). Works with any object type.

tools.name: GetNodeStructureLow
tools.description: [low-level] Fetch node structure from ADT repository. Used for object tree navigation and structure discovery. Can use session_id and session_state from GetSession to maintain the same session.

tools.name: GetVirtualFoldersLow
tools.description: [low-level] Retrieve hierarchical virtual folder contents from ADT information system. Used for browsing ABAP objects by package, group, type, etc.

tools.name: emergency_status
tools.description: Get the emergency stop latch status for one printer or the entire fleet.

tools.name: update_event
tools.description: PREFERRED: Update event fields without iCal formatting. Supports: SUMMARY (title), DESCRIPTION (details), LOCATION (place), DTSTART (start time), DTEND (end time), STATUS (TENTATIVE/CONFIRMED/CANCELLED), and any RFC 5545 property including custom X-* properties (e.g., X-ZOOM-LINK, X-MEETING-ROOM).

tools.name: fedbrain_search
tools.description: FedBrain context-weighted search: Search the global commons, weighting results by tech-stack similarity.

tools.name: agent_spawn
tools.description: Spawn a new agent in the swarm (V2 compatible). Deprecated: Use agent/spawn instead.

tools.name: drift_java
tools.description: Analyze Java projects: routes, error handling, data access, annotations. Actions: status (project overview), routes (HTTP routes - Spring MVC, JAX-RS, Micronaut, Quarkus), errors (error handling patterns), data-access (database patterns - Spring Data JPA, Hibernate, JDBC, MyBatis), annotations (annotation usage).

tools.name: file_upload_delete
tools.description: Delete a previously uploaded file by its handle
tools.human_notes: FN: file deletion (integrity) -- "delete" is a write keyword, not a sensitivity keyword

tools.name: cache_status
tools.description: Get cache status (Redis, WP object cache, hit rates).

tools.name: audit_mcp_server
tools.description: Launch a target MCP server over stdio, enumerate tools, and run active security probes against its exposed tools. Requires AGENT_SECURITY_ADMIN_MODE=1.
tools.human_notes: FN: launches servers + runs security probes (autonomy) -- domain-specific vocabulary

tools.name: ReadMetadataExtension
tools.description: [read-only] Read ABAP metadata extension (DDLX) source code and metadata (package, responsible, description, etc.).

tools.name: ordinals_p2p_counter
tools.human_notes: FN: BIP-137 wallet signing for counter-offers (autonomy) -- crypto-specific

tools.name: multiply
tools.description: Multiply two numbers.

tools.name: pattern_store
tools.description: Store learned pattern

tools.name: verify_audit_chain
tools.description: Walks the hash-chained audit log and verifies every entry. Returns chain integrity status - valid/invalid, entry count, and where the chain breaks if tampered.

tools.name: get_top_expenses
tools.description: Get top expenses grouped by category or vendor.

tools.name: memory_search_unified
tools.description: Search across both Claude Code memories and AgentDB entries using semantic vector similarity. Returns merged, deduplicated results from all namespaces. Use when native Read/Write is wrong because you need (a) cross-session retrieval by semantic similarity (vector embeddings) not by file path, (b) namespacing across projects without managing directory layout, or (c) the .swarm/memory.db audit trail. For one-shot file I/O, native Read/Write is fine.

tools.name: get_transport_classification
tools.description: Get UN transport classification for chemicals (dangerous goods shipping).

tools.name: opengrok_update_memory
tools.description: Write or append to active-task.md or investigation-log.md.

tools.name: get_settings_metadata
tools.description: Get all settings metadata for an entity type

tools.name: sona/lora/apply-base
tools.description: Apply base-layer LoRA adaptation

tools.name: list_recent_briefs
tools.description: List the caller's most recent decision briefs.

tools.name: get_board_labels
tools.description: Get all labels of a specific board

tools.name: get_summary_profile
tools.description: Get company profile information including sector, industry, and business summary. Handles missing sector data with fallback classification.

tools.name: BuyWhere Singapore catalog
tools.description: Available product categories in Singapore

tools.name: search_geolocations
tools.description: Search or look up geo locations for campaign geo targeting. Search by name (query) to find locations, or provide geoIds to look up specific locations by ID. Returns location display name, entity type (Country/AdminArea/Locality), and ID for use in ad group targeting.

tools.name: sqlite_transaction_rollback
tools.description: Rollback the current transaction, discarding all changes.
tools.human_notes: FN: discards database changes (integrity) -- "rollback" not in keyword list

tools.name: klaviyo_events_get_profile
tools.description: Get the profile associated with an event.

tools.name: ruvllm_sona_create
tools.description: Create a SONA instant adaptation loop (<1ms adaptation cycles). Use when sending every prompt to the Anthropic API is wrong because you need local inference — air-gapped environments, MicroLoRA-fine-tuned per-task adapters, or sub-cent per-call cost. For general Claude work native Task is the right call.

tools.name: morph_list_supermodels
tools.description: List all supermodels (W1 through W19): id, name, role, lane, lead shape, tagline. The supermodel directory is the canonical lineage for every spawned brood variant. Free up to 100 calls/day per agent-DID; $0.001/call thereafter via x402 USDC settlement on Base.

tools.name: get_text_extents
tools.description: Calculate the bounding box of a text string.

tools.name: ActivateDataElementLow
tools.description: Operation: Activate, Create, Update. Subject: DataElement. Will be useful for activating, creating, or updating data element. [low-level] Activate an ABAP data element. Returns activation status and any warnings/errors. Can use session_id and session_state from GetSession to maintain the same session.

false_negative_patterns: #74 file_upload_delete: file deletion (integrity) -- "delete" is a write keyword, not a sensitivity keyword
#76 audit_mcp_server: launches servers + runs security probes (autonomy) -- domain-specific vocabulary
